posts.text:
You are using the wrong word...the admin is deadly serious and has a focus and ambition I have not seen...you just do not like it. I get it...but do not underrate the intentionality.


Maine (@TheMaineWonk)

The first sit down interview the President of United States grants after launching his regime change War in Iran is with Jake Paul. 

We are not a serious country.
This is not a serious administration. 

You don’t hate this timeline enough.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/TheMaineWonk/st

Matters. Maga why is this ok?


Citizens for Ethics (@CREWcrew)

Trump announced Jared Kushner as Special Peace Envoy on February 19th.

That means Kushner only has 8 more days to file his legally required public financial disclosure report. The public needs to understand his financial entanglements. 
citizensforethics.org/legal-…

posts.text:
Wasnt israel. Stop trying to play gotcha


Allison Troskie (@AllisonTroskie)

Chris, Americas do not need a visa to visit Israel. They need an online ETA for a 90 day entry. Having said that, Nancy is doing some good work, but she needs less of her PR!



— https://nitter.net/AllisonTroskie/status/2032144411237499126#m

I don't understand your vibe at all.
